description_long: This is a modern, open-frame shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood, featuring a geometric, asymmetrical arrangement of rectangular compartments. The design consists of six box-like shelves of varying sizes, interconnected in a visually striking, staggered pattern. The shelves are open on all sides, allowing for easy access and display of items from multiple angles. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and warm appearance. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed sections, emphasizing its minimalist and functional style. This type of shelving is suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public waiting areas, where both aesthetics and accessibility are important.
description: A modern, open-frame wooden shelving unit with six asymmetrically arranged rectangular compartments and a visible wood grain finish.
description_view_0: The shelving unit is seen from the front, clearly displaying all six open rectangular compartments in their staggered arrangement.
description_view_1: A side view showing the narrow profile of the shelving unit, with the depth of the shelves visible but no interior compartments exposed.
description_view_2: The shelving unit is viewed from the back, mirroring the front but with the same open compartments and staggered design visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the vertical alignment and depth of the shelves without revealing the open compartments.
